description: Address review feedback: fix UTC date logic, prevent duplicate reminder emails, secure the reminder endpoint, and validate PATCH inputs.
steps: Create a helper function to compute 'today' using the user's timezone from the DB
Update page.tsx, lib/actions.ts, toggle route, and water route to use timezone-aware 'today'
Add last_reminded_at column to medications table to prevent duplicate reminder sends
Update reminders/check route to check last_reminded_at before sending and to verify CRON_SECRET
Add input validation to the PATCH handler mirroring the POST handler's logic
Run npm run build and npm run lint to verify
acceptance_criteria: All 'today' computations use the user's timezone from the DB, not UTC
Reminder endpoint checks CRON_SECRET environment variable and rejects unauthorized requests
Reminder endpoint does not send duplicate emails for the same medication/time within the same day
PATCH endpoint validates name and reminder_times the same way as POST
npm run build succeeds with no errors
verification: eval "$(mise activate bash)" && cd /projects/sandbox/nextjs-medication-reminder && npm run build
eval "$(mise activate bash)" && cd /projects/sandbox/nextjs-medication-reminder && npm run lint
